<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Returns the hash of the current block, the seedHash, and the boundary condition to be met ('target')."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/mnr_getWork"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



**`mnr_getWork`** - Returns the hash of the current block, the seedHash, and the boundary condition to be met ('target').

Send a **JSON-RPC 2.0** request (`jsonrpc`, `method`, `params`, `id`) as in the example below.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["jsonrpc","method","params","id"],"properties":{"jsonrpc":{"type":"string","enum":["2.0"]},"method":{"type":"string","enum":["mnr_getWork"]},"params":{"type":"array","description":"Ordered JSON array of positional parameters for this method.","minItems":0,"maxItems":0,"items":{}},"id":{"oneOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"string"}],"example":1}}},"example":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"mnr_getWork","params":[],"id":1}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Successful JSON-RPC 2.0 response over HTTP. The return value is in `result`. On failure, nodes typically still respond with HTTP 200 and an `error` object instead of `result`.","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["jsonrpc","id","result"],"properties":{"jsonrpc":{"type":"string","enum":["2.0"]},"id":{"oneOf":[{"type":"integer"},{"type":"string"}]},"result":{"title":"getWorkResults","type":"array","items":[{"title":"powHash","description":"Current block header PoW hash.","type":"string","pattern":"^0x([a-fA-F\\d]{64})?$"},{"title":"seedHash","description":"The seed hash used for the DAG.","type":"string","pattern":"^0x([a-fA-F\\d]{64})?$"},{"title":"difficulty","description":"The boundary condition ('target'), 2^256 / difficulty.","type":"string","pattern":"^0x([a-fA-F\\d]{64})?$"}]}}},"example":{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"result":["0x1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef1234567890abcdef","0x5EED00000000000000000000000000005EED0000000000000000000000000000","0xd1ff1c01710000000000000000000000d1ff1c01710000000000000000000000"]}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
